Module kivakit.microservice
Package com.telenav.kivakit.microservice.microservlet

Interface MicroservletRequestHandler

All Superinterfaces:
com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Listener, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.naming.NamedObject, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Receiver, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Transceiver, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Transmitter
All Known Subinterfaces:
MicroservletRequest
All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseMicroservletRequest
public interface MicroservletRequestHandler extends com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Listener
Prepares MicroservletResponse when onRespond() is called.
Author:
jonathanl (shibo)

    • onRequestHandlingStatistics

      MicroservletResponse onRespond()

    • respond

      default MicroservletResponse respond(String path)
      Produces a response to the current request

      Returns:
